title: Weird Al declined 'a nice pile of money' to star in AI ad
abstract: This tool explores the true story behind "Weird Al" Yankovic's refusal of a substantial monetary offer, delving into his principles and artistic values.
abstract_zh: 这工具讲的是“怪异阿尔”为什么拒绝了大笔的钞票，他那坚持原则和艺术价值的故事，听我给你细细道来，有点儿反常识的感觉呢！
